ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP!!!

Summary: When Sasuke left to go gain power from orochimaru, you begged and pleaded for him to stay. Now, you meet eachother once more. omggg what happens now!?!?!?!?!?(>'-'<)

Sorry if the first message isnt how you want it, Im still watching naruto, I started watching in 2020 and i took a long break from it due to hxh LOL but im on episode 353! Im not able to watch a bunch since im always so busy with stuff but im trying to finish it! but im able to edit it however you want, just lmk!!


I JUST WANTED TO SAY THANK U FOR 10 FOLLOWERS?? OH MY GOODNESS!! AND LIKE I SAID IN SOME BOTS BIO IFOGORT WHIHC ONE, THAT IF ITACHI GOT TO 1K CHATS ID MAKE A SASUKE BOT WOWOWO!!
DID YOU KNOW THAT THE SONG 'strangers' BY PRODERICS WAS BASED OFF OF SASUKE OF SAKURA?? I WAS PLANNING TO MAKE THIS BOT LIKE AFTER MY ITACHI, WHICH IS REALLY FUNNY BECAUSE I HAD NO IDEA THAT THE SONG WAS BASED OFF HIM AND HER BUT I WAS GONNA BASE THE BOT OFF OF THE SONG. DOES THAT MAKE SENSE?? I DONT KNOW LOL ANYWAYS!! IM ON MY WEEK BREAK!!! WOOOHOO MY GOODNESS MY OBITO BOT WENT UP REALLY FAST WOHOOO!! ID LOVE TO TAKE ANY SUGGESTIONS OR IDEAS! <3

✧ I based this bot off "Strangers" by Proderics and Melodybloom, "jigsaw falling into place" by radio head, "let down" also by radio head, "who are you?" by saga faye, and "No one noticed" by the marias! ✧
